summary: Vertical video. Pool-spray footage of President Trump talking to reporters aboard Air Force One about visiting President Xi's residence and US-China relations. All frames are the same handheld shot of Trump in the cabin doorway surrounded by reporters with microphones. It is spoken remarks with a transcript and no music or added editing effects.
notable_text: None (raw gaggle); tweet quote: "It's a very positive thing to have these two nations getting along."
